grant_title: Merchant Organizing, Business Improvement District (BID) Formation, and Small BID Support Grants
project_area: Commercial corridor revitalization, merchant organizing, and BID formation/support
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond geographic eligibility (NYC-based organizations)
eligibility_summary: Nonprofits, BIDs, CBDOs, and neighborhood-based organizations in NYC are eligible. Merchant Organizing Grants require proposals for forming/reactivating merchants associations. BID Formation Grants require established steering committees and needs assessments. Small BID Support Grants target BIDs with annual assessments ≤$600,000 or ≤$1M in low- to moderate-income neighborhoods.
